seoTitle: Dundee Downs vs Durack — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dundee Downs and Durack. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Dundee Downs vs Durack: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dundee Downs and Durack.
heading: Dundee Downs vs Durack — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dundee Downs, Northern Territory and Durack, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Durack has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Dundee Downs (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dundee Downs or Durack safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dundee Downs has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Durack scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dundee Downs scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Durack scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dundee Downs or Durack?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Durack has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
